evals.prompt: Transform these weekly goals into SMART goals: 1) 80/20 of the finance app 2) Work on mobile optimization 3) Finish documentation
evals.expected_output: Three transformed SMART goals with specific deliverables, measurable criteria, and deadlines

evals.prompt: /smart-goals weekly - show me before/after for my weekly tasks
evals.expected_output: Weekly goals table transformed with SMART format showing original vs transformed tasks

evals.prompt: Make these backlog items into SMART goals: 'Look into new API', 'Optimize database queries', 'Update user interface'
evals.expected_output: Backlog items transformed with specific actions, metrics, and deadlines
